title: Theme Section Builder

fields.label: Flush Last Section to Footer
fields.name: flush_last_section_to_footer
fields.instructions: Removes the default top margin on the site footer so the last section can sit flush against it.

fields.label: Page Sections
fields.name: page_sections
fields.instructions: Build the page from reusable section blocks. For styled lists in any WYSIWYG field, switch to Text mode and add class="lacc-keyline-list" to the UL for the decorative version or class="lacc-keyline-list--plain" for the no-bullet version. No LI class is needed.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: section_eyebrow
sub_fields.placeholder: Optional small label above the heading

sub_fields.label: Background Video URL
sub_fields.name: background_video_url
sub_fields.instructions: Paste the Vimeo player URL or Wistia media/embed URL.

sub_fields.label: Video Library URL
sub_fields.name: background_video_library_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional override for the player library script URL.
sub_fields.placeholder: Leave blank to use the default library URL

sub_fields.label: Hero Heading
sub_fields.name: background_video_h1
sub_fields.instructions: Allows light inline markup such as <b>, <strong>, <i>, <em>, and <br>.

sub_fields.label: Hero Subheading
sub_fields.name: background_video_h2
sub_fields.instructions: Optional rich text under the main heading.

sub_fields.label: Hero Subhead Font Face
sub_fields.name: heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the hero subhead.

sub_fields.label: Hero Subhead Weight
sub_fields.name: heading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the hero subhead.

sub_fields.label: Hero Heading Color
sub_fields.name: hero_heading_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color override for the main hero heading. Scoped to this section only.

sub_fields.label: Hero Heading Max Width
sub_fields.name: heading_max_width
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS max-width for the main hero heading.

sub_fields.label: Hero Subhead Color
sub_fields.name: hero_subheading_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color override for the hero subheading. Scoped to this section only.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional text color for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Face
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Weight
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Size
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS font-size for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Background
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional background color for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Border
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_border
sub_fields.instructions: Optional full CSS border value, such as 1px solid #51534a.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Padding
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS padding for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Border Radius
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_border_radius
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS border-radius for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Show Closure Notice
sub_fields.name: background_video_closure_notice_show
sub_fields.instructions: Turn on to display the notice box inside the hero.

sub_fields.label: Closure Notice Content
sub_fields.name: background_video_closure_notice
sub_fields.instructions: Optional notice content.

sub_fields.label: Factoid Value Font Face
sub_fields.name: factoid_value_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the factoid value.

sub_fields.label: Factoid Value Weight
sub_fields.name: factoid_value_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the factoid value.

sub_fields.label: Factoid Value Color
sub_fields.name: factoid_value_color
sub_fields.instructions: Color used for the numeric factoid values in the hero stats row.

sub_fields.label: Factoid Label Font Face
sub_fields.name: factoid_label_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the factoid label.

sub_fields.label: Factoid Label Weight
sub_fields.name: factoid_label_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the factoid label.

sub_fields.label: Factoid Label Color
sub_fields.name: factoid_label_color
sub_fields.instructions: Color used for the factoid label text in the hero stats row.

sub_fields.label: Hero Factoids
sub_fields.name: hero_factoids
sub_fields.instructions: Optional stats row shown above the buttons.

sub_fields.label: Hero CTA Buttons
sub_fields.name: hero_cta_buttons
sub_fields.instructions: Optional buttons shown below the factoids.

sub_fields.label: CTA Text Size
sub_fields.name: cta_text_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS font-size for the hero CTA buttons.

sub_fields.label: CTA Padding
sub_fields.name: cta_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS padding for the hero CTA buttons.

sub_fields.label: CTA Letter Spacing
sub_fields.name: cta_letter_spacing
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS letter-spacing for the hero CTA buttons.

sub_fields.label: Legacy Single Button Label
sub_fields.name: background_video_button_label
sub_fields.instructions: Optional fallback for older content. Use the CTA repeater above for new builds.

sub_fields.label: Legacy Single Button URL
sub_fields.name: background_video_button_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional fallback for older content.

sub_fields.label: Legacy Single Button Style
sub_fields.name: background_video_button_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the fallback button style for older video hero content.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Used for page hash links e.g. #your-id

sub_fields.label: Section Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: section_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Variant
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Promoted sandbox variants for eyebrow treatment.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional heading displayed above both columns.

sub_fields.label: Section Intro
sub_fields.name: section_intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional text displayed below the section heading, above the columns.

sub_fields.label: Column A Image
sub_fields.name: col_a_image
sub_fields.instructions: If set, the image fills the full column height. Add text below to overlay it with a gradient scrim.

sub_fields.label: Column A Background Color
sub_fields.name: col_a_background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Background color for a content-only column.

sub_fields.label: Column B Image
sub_fields.name: col_b_image
sub_fields.instructions: If set, the image fills the full column height. Add text below to overlay it with a gradient scrim.

sub_fields.label: Column B Background Color
sub_fields.name: col_b_background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Background color for a content-only column.

sub_fields.label: Container Width
sub_fields.name: container_type
sub_fields.instructions: Full Width spans the viewport edge-to-edge — best for photography. Container constrains the grid to 1170px.

sub_fields.label: Column Gap
sub_fields.name: column_gap
sub_fields.instructions: Gap between columns. Default 0 (edge-to-edge). E.g. 2px, 20px.

sub_fields.label: Column Min Height
sub_fields.name: col_min_height
sub_fields.instructions: Minimum height for both columns. Important for image-only columns. Default 480px.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Type Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_color
sub_fields.instructions: Text color for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Alignment
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Independent eyebrow alignment.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Fill Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_fill_color
sub_fields.instructions: Used by Pill and Ink variants.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Border Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_border_color
sub_fields.instructions: Used by Pill and Ink variants.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Border Width
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_border_width
sub_fields.instructions: CSS unit value, e.g. 1px or 2px.

sub_fields.label: Section Background
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Background behind the two columns (visible if padding is set or columns have gaps).

sub_fields.label: Extra CSS Classes
sub_fields.name: section_classes
sub_fields.instructions: Space-separated. Optional.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for linking directly to this section. Example: packages will create page#packages.

sub_fields.label: Heading Font Family
sub_fields.name: heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Weight
sub_fields.name: heading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Size
sub_fields.name: heading_size
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the size for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Max Width
sub_fields.name: heading_max_width
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS max-width for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Subheading Font Family
sub_fields.name: subheading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for card titles and smaller headings in this section.

sub_fields.label: Subheading Weight
sub_fields.name: subheading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for card titles and smaller headings in this section.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional text color for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Face
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Weight
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Size
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS font-size for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Background
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional background color for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Border
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_border
sub_fields.instructions: Optional full CSS border value, such as 1px solid #51534a.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Padding
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS padding for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Border Radius
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_border_radius
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS border-radius for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text Transform
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_text_transform
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the eyebrow text should be cased.

sub_fields.label: Intro CTA Label
sub_fields.name: section_button_label
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button shown below the intro copy.

sub_fields.label: Intro CTA URL
sub_fields.name: section_button_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button link shown below the intro copy.

sub_fields.label: Intro CTA Style
sub_fields.name: section_button_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the button style.

sub_fields.label: Intro CTA Alignment
sub_fields.name: section_button_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Optional override for the intro CTA alignment. Leave blank to inherit Content Alignment.

sub_fields.label: Bottom CTA Label
sub_fields.name: section_bottom_button_label
sub_fields.instructions: Optional second button shown below the card grid.

sub_fields.label: Bottom CTA URL
sub_fields.name: section_bottom_button_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional second button link shown below the card grid.

sub_fields.label: Bottom CTA Style
sub_fields.name: section_bottom_button_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the button style.

sub_fields.label: Bottom CTA Alignment
sub_fields.name: section_bottom_button_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Optional override for the bottom CTA alignment. Leave blank to inherit Content Alignment.

sub_fields.label: CTA Text Size
sub_fields.name: cta_text_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS font-size for the section CTA buttons.

sub_fields.label: CTA Padding
sub_fields.name: cta_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS padding for the section CTA buttons.

sub_fields.label: CTA Letter Spacing
sub_fields.name: cta_letter_spacing
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS letter-spacing for the section CTA buttons.

sub_fields.label: Content After Card Grid
sub_fields.name: post_grid_content
sub_fields.instructions: Optional content shown below the card grid.

sub_fields.label: Post Content Max Width
sub_fields.name: post_content_max_width
sub_fields.instructions: Optional max-width for the content block that appears below the card grid. Use any CSS unit, such as 900px or 70rem.

sub_fields.label: Background Gradient
sub_fields.name: background_gradient
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS gradient for the section background. Defaults to the soft cream surface gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,243,237,0.92) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.92) 100%).

sub_fields.label: Background Vertical Position
sub_fields.name: background_vertical_position
sub_fields.instructions: Optional vertical position for the background image, such as top, center, bottom, or 30%.

sub_fields.label: Enable Background Parallax
sub_fields.name: background_parallax
sub_fields.instructions: Uses fixed background attachment for a simple parallax effect.

sub_fields.label: Scrollwork Color
sub_fields.name: scrollwork_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the scrollwork ornament.

sub_fields.label: Section Keyline
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_position
sub_fields.instructions: Optional 1px divider line at the top or bottom of the section.

sub_fields.label: Keyline Color
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the 1px section keyline.

sub_fields.label: Header Column Width
sub_fields.name: header_column_width
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the Bootstrap column width for the intro/header row.

sub_fields.label: Header Box Background
sub_fields.name: header_background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional fill color for the card grid header container. The color picker already supports opacity.

sub_fields.label: Header Box Width
sub_fields.name: header_width
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS width for the header box.

sub_fields.label: Header Box Max Width
sub_fields.name: header_max_width
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS max-width for the header box.

sub_fields.label: Padding Below Intro Copy
sub_fields.name: section_intro_spacing_bottom
sub_fields.instructions: Applies additional bottom padding to the header container above the card repeater.

sub_fields.label: Enable Card Hover Effect
sub_fields.name: enable_card_hover_effect
sub_fields.instructions: Adds the homepage-style lift and drop shadow effect to cards in this grid.

sub_fields.label: Card Heading Font
sub_fields.name: card_heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Optional font family override for the card headings.

sub_fields.label: Card Heading Weight
sub_fields.name: card_heading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Optional font weight override for the card headings.

sub_fields.label: Card Heading Size
sub_fields.name: card_heading_font_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional size override for the card headings. Use any CSS unit, such as 24px or 1.5rem.

sub_fields.label: Card Heading Color
sub_fields.name: card_heading_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color override for the card headings.

sub_fields.label: Card Content Padding
sub_fields.name: card_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the inner padding for all card content blocks in this section.

sub_fields.label: Card Top Padding
sub_fields.name: card_padding_top
sub_fields.instructions: Optional top padding override for the card body content.

sub_fields.label: Card Bottom Padding
sub_fields.name: card_padding_bottom
sub_fields.instructions: Optional bottom padding override for the card body content.

sub_fields.label: Card Gutters
sub_fields.name: card_gutter
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the spacing between cards in this section.

sub_fields.label: Align Card Bottoms
sub_fields.name: equalize_card_bottoms
sub_fields.instructions: Makes the cards equal height and pins the CTA button to the bottom of each card.

sub_fields.label: Space Above Card Button
sub_fields.name: card_button_spacing
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the gap between the card content and the CTA button when bottom alignment is enabled.

sub_fields.label: Card CTA Alignment
sub_fields.name: card_button_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the alignment of CTA buttons inside the cards.

sub_fields.label: Card Background Gradient
sub_fields.name: card_background_gradient
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS gradient value for the card backgrounds. Defaults to the soft cream surface gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,243,237,0.92) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.92) 100%).

sub_fields.label: Card Border Color
sub_fields.name: card_border_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional 1px border color for the cards in this section. Leave empty for no border.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Variant
sub_fields.name: card_badge_variant
sub_fields.instructions: Promoted badge model for cards in this section.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Alignment
sub_fields.name: card_badge_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Horizontal placement for the card badge.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Type Color
sub_fields.name: card_badge_type_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional override for badge text color.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Fill Color
sub_fields.name: card_badge_fill_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional override for badge background color.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Border Color
sub_fields.name: card_badge_border_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional border color for the promoted badge model.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Border Width
sub_fields.name: card_badge_border_width
sub_fields.instructions: CSS width value, e.g. 1px or 2px.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge Border Radius
sub_fields.name: card_badge_border_radius
sub_fields.instructions: CSS radius value. Leave blank for variant default.

sub_fields.label: Card Badge
sub_fields.name: card_badge
sub_fields.instructions: Optional badge text shown at the top of the card.

sub_fields.label: Gravity Form
sub_fields.name: card_gravity_form_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional Gravity Form to display inside this card.

sub_fields.label: Card CTA Style
sub_fields.name: card_button_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the button style for this card CTA.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for linking directly to this section. Example: photo-gallery will create page#photo-gallery.

sub_fields.label: Heading Font Family
sub_fields.name: heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Weight
sub_fields.name: heading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Max Width
sub_fields.name: heading_max_width
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS max-width for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Font Size
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_font_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS font-size for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text Transform
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_text_transform
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the eyebrow text should be cased.

sub_fields.label: Subheading Font Family
sub_fields.name: subheading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for smaller headings and captions in this section.

sub_fields.label: Subheading Weight
sub_fields.name: subheading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for smaller headings and captions in this section.

sub_fields.label: Scroller CTA Label
sub_fields.name: section_button_label
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button shown below the image scroller.

sub_fields.label: Scroller CTA URL
sub_fields.name: section_button_url
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button link shown below the image scroller.

sub_fields.label: Scroller CTA Style
sub_fields.name: section_button_style
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the button style.

sub_fields.label: Scroller CTA Alignment
sub_fields.name: section_button_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Optional override for the scroller CTA alignment. Leave blank to inherit Content Alignment.

sub_fields.label: CTA Text Size
sub_fields.name: cta_text_size
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS font-size for the scroller CTA button.

sub_fields.label: CTA Padding
sub_fields.name: cta_padding
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS padding for the scroller CTA button.

sub_fields.label: CTA Letter Spacing
sub_fields.name: cta_letter_spacing
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS letter-spacing for the scroller CTA button.

sub_fields.label: Background Gradient
sub_fields.name: background_gradient
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CSS gradient for the section background. Defaults to the soft cream surface gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,243,237,0.92) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.92) 100%).

sub_fields.label: Scrollwork Color
sub_fields.name: scrollwork_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the scrollwork ornament.

sub_fields.label: Section Keyline
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_position
sub_fields.instructions: Optional 1px divider line at the top or bottom of the section.

sub_fields.label: Keyline Color
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the 1px section keyline.

sub_fields.label: Image Height
sub_fields.name: scroller_image_height
sub_fields.instructions: Set the visible height of the scroller images, such as 220px or 18rem.

sub_fields.label: Image Ratio
sub_fields.name: scroller_image_ratio
sub_fields.instructions: Optional ratio for scroller images, such as 1:1, 4:3, 3:2, or 16:9. Leave blank to keep the default width.

sub_fields.label: Image Gap
sub_fields.name: scroller_image_gap
sub_fields.instructions: Set the gap between images, such as 18px.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for this collage section.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text Transform
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_text_transform
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the eyebrow text should be cased.

sub_fields.label: Intro Copy
sub_fields.name: section_intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional copy above the collage.

sub_fields.label: Container Type
sub_fields.name: container_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the section width wrapper.

sub_fields.label: Background Color
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional section background color behind the collage.

sub_fields.label: Collage Min Height
sub_fields.name: collage_min_height
sub_fields.instructions: Desktop collage canvas height.

sub_fields.label: Grid Gap
sub_fields.name: collage_gap
sub_fields.instructions: Space between the collage items before offsets are applied.

sub_fields.label: Blend Mode
sub_fields.name: blend_mode
sub_fields.instructions: Multiply gives the overlapping print effect from the reference image.

sub_fields.label: Hover Scale
sub_fields.name: hover_scale
sub_fields.instructions: Small grow effect on hover. Example: 1.04

sub_fields.label: Images
sub_fields.instructions: Use the desktop column and row settings to place each image on a 12-column grid.

sub_fields.label: Collage Images
sub_fields.name: collage_images
sub_fields.instructions: Add and position each image. Start with 3 to 5 items for the strongest collage effect.

sub_fields.label: Optional Image Link
sub_fields.name: image_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional click-through URL.

sub_fields.label: Alt Override
sub_fields.name: alt_text_override
sub_fields.instructions: Optional accessible alt text override.

sub_fields.label: Column Start
sub_fields.name: column_start
sub_fields.instructions: Desktop grid start column. Use 1 through 12.

sub_fields.label: Column Span
sub_fields.name: column_span
sub_fields.instructions: How many columns wide this image should be.

sub_fields.label: Row Start
sub_fields.name: row_start
sub_fields.instructions: Desktop grid start row.

sub_fields.label: Row Span
sub_fields.name: row_span
sub_fields.instructions: How many rows tall this image should be.

sub_fields.label: Offset X
sub_fields.name: offset_x
sub_fields.instructions: Optional horizontal nudge such as -20px or 1rem.

sub_fields.label: Offset Y
sub_fields.name: offset_y
sub_fields.instructions: Optional vertical nudge such as -30px or 1rem.

sub_fields.label: Rotation
sub_fields.name: rotation
sub_fields.instructions: Optional slight rotation like -2deg or 1deg.

sub_fields.label: Stack Order
sub_fields.name: z_index
sub_fields.instructions: Higher numbers sit on top.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for linking directly to this section.

sub_fields.label: Featured Article
sub_fields.name: featured_article
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the article to feature in this block. Leave blank to hide the section.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: section_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the article title.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color override for the eyebrow label.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text Transform
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_text_transform
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the eyebrow text should be cased.

sub_fields.label: Title Color
sub_fields.name: title_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color override for the article title.

sub_fields.label: Copy Color
sub_fields.name: body_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color override for the excerpt copy.

sub_fields.label: Override Title
sub_fields.name: override_title
sub_fields.instructions: Optional custom heading. Leave blank to use the article title.

sub_fields.label: Override Image
sub_fields.name: override_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional image override. Leave blank to use the article's featured image.

sub_fields.label: Override Excerpt
sub_fields.name: custom_excerpt
sub_fields.instructions: Optional custom summary. Leave blank to use the article excerpt.

sub_fields.label: Title Font Face
sub_fields.name: heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the article title.

sub_fields.label: Title Font Weight
sub_fields.name: heading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the article title.

sub_fields.label: Image Position
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the image appears on the left or right side of the article content.

sub_fields.label: Section Keyline
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_position
sub_fields.instructions: Optional 1px divider line for the top or bottom of the section.

sub_fields.label: Keyline Color
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the section keyline.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for linking directly to this section.

sub_fields.label: Feature Image
sub_fields.name: section_image
sub_fields.instructions: Primary image for the split feature section.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: section_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the heading.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text Transform
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_text_transform
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the eyebrow text should be cased.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Allows light inline markup such as <strong>, <em>, and <br>.
sub_fields.placeholder: A place to gather, not just dine

sub_fields.label: Copy
sub_fields.name: section_copy
sub_fields.instructions: Primary copy block for the split feature section.

sub_fields.label: Heading Font Face
sub_fields.name: heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Heading Font Weight
sub_fields.name: heading_font_weight
sub_fields.instructions: Set the weight for the section heading.

sub_fields.label: Image Position
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the image appears on the left or right side of the content.

sub_fields.label: Image Min Height
sub_fields.name: image_min_height
sub_fields.instructions: Optional minimum height for the image panel.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow / Accent Color
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_color
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the eyebrow color and the gold-side scrollwork accent.

sub_fields.label: Section Keyline
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_position
sub_fields.instructions: Optional 1px divider line for the top or bottom of the section.

sub_fields.label: Keyline Color
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the section keyline.

sub_fields.label: Section Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for linking directly to this section.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: section_eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small label above the FAQ heading.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow Text Transform
sub_fields.name: eyebrow_text_transform
sub_fields.instructions: Choose how the eyebrow text should be cased.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading
sub_fields.name: section_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Allows light inline markup such as <strong>, <em>, and <br>.

sub_fields.label: Intro Copy
sub_fields.name: section_intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional intro text above the categories and accordion groups.

sub_fields.label: Categories Heading
sub_fields.name: categories_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Shown above the category jump links when there is more than one FAQ group.

sub_fields.label: Categories Supporting Copy
sub_fields.name: categories_intro
sub_fields.instructions: Optional copy under the category links, for example the contact email line.

sub_fields.label: FAQ Groups
sub_fields.name: faq_groups
sub_fields.instructions: Add one or more FAQ categories, each with its own list of questions and answers.

sub_fields.label: Group Title
sub_fields.name: faq_section
sub_fields.instructions: Examples: Reservation & Arrival, Guest Rooms, Dining at the Lodge.

sub_fields.label: Group Anchor ID
sub_fields.name: faq_section_anchor_id
sub_fields.instructions: Optional in-page anchor for this FAQ group.

sub_fields.label: Group Summary
sub_fields.name: faq_section_summary
sub_fields.instructions: Short descriptive line shown in the category jump list under the group title.
sub_fields.placeholder: Brief summary of the questions this group answers.

sub_fields.label: Section Heading Font Face
sub_fields.name: heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the main section heading.

sub_fields.label: Accordion Question Font Face
sub_fields.name: accordion_heading_font_family
sub_fields.instructions: Choose the typeface for the question headings. Freight Big Pro is the more readable default for this component.

sub_fields.label: Content Alignment
sub_fields.name: content_alignment
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the alignment of the section header and supporting copy.

sub_fields.label: Container Width
sub_fields.name: container_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose whether the section uses the standard centered container or full-width container shell.

sub_fields.label: Additional Section Classes
sub_fields.name: section_classes
sub_fields.instructions: Optional extra classes for one-off layout tweaks.

sub_fields.label: Section Keyline
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_position
sub_fields.instructions: Optional 1px divider line for the top or bottom of the section.

sub_fields.label: Keyline Color
sub_fields.name: section_keyline_color
sub_fields.instructions: Optional color for the section keyline and accordion dividers.

description: Flexible page builder fields for the reusable theme sections.
